headline: Cory Smith
image_alt_text: A social card featuring verified Hush Line user Cory Smith, their bio, their tip line URL, and a QR code that links to the same URL.

social.bluesky:
🤩 Verified Member Highlight!

Cory Smith is an investigative journalist and political reporter at The Hill, with a commitment to accuracy and protecting sources.

Send Cory a tip: https://tips.hushline.app/to/coryjosmith
